title: RBU
short description: RBU is a time code radio station located in Moscow.  It transmits a continuous 10 kW time code on 66.66 kHz.
description:
**RBU** is a time code radio station located in Moscow. It transmits a continuous 10 kW time code on 66⅔ kHz.

There are 2 main tones AM modulated onto sidebands, 100 Hz and 312.5 Hz. 100 Hz denotes a "0" bit, whereas 312.5 Hz denotes a "1". These are used to sync clocks and give the exact time.
